---
title: "Software"
sidebar: research
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

<style>
.repo-intro {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  max-width: 950px;
}

.repo-section {
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
}

.repo-section h2 {
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.repo-section-intro {
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  color: #444;
  max-width: 900px;
}

.repo-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.2rem;
}

.repo-card {
  border: 1px solid #ddd;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
  background: #fff;
  height: 100%;
}

.repo-grid-single {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(260px, 420px);
  gap: 1.2rem;
  justify-content: start;
}

.repo-card h3 {
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
  font-size: 1.08rem;
}

.repo-card p {
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  color: #444;
}

.repo-tags {
  margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
}

.repo-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
  margin: 0 0.35rem 0.35rem 0;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #f3f4f6;
  border: 1px solid #e1e3e6;
  color: #555;
}

.repo-links {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.repo-links a {
  text-decoration: none;
}

.repo-links a + a::before {
  content: " · ";
  color: #999;
}

@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .repo-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>

::: {.repo-intro}
The Girke lab develops open-source software for data-intensive research in genome biology, chemical genomics, and bioinformatics. The repositories below highlight selected tools for drug discovery, spatial omics visualization, and scalable workflow-based analysis.
:::

## Drug Discovery and Chemical Informatics {#drug-discovery .repo-section}

::: {.repo-section-intro}
This area includes software for chemical similarity searching, bioactivity analysis, compound-target mapping, and related cheminformatics applications in small-molecule discovery.
:::

::: {.repo-grid}

::: {.repo-card}
### signatureSearch

Tools for gene expression signature analysis and the discovery of related perturbagens, compounds, and biological mechanisms, with companion data resources provided through the associated `signatureSearchData` package.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Drug Discovery</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Transcriptomics</span>
<span class="repo-tag">R</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/signatureSearch/) [GitHub](https://github.com/girke-lab/signatureSearch)
:::
:::

::: {.repo-card}
### drugTargetInteractions

Software for identifying and analyzing compound-target interaction relationships in support of computational drug discovery.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Drug Discovery</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Targets</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Bioactivity</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/drugTargetInteractions/) [GitHub](https://github.com/girke-lab/drugTargetInteractions)
:::
:::

::: {.repo-card}
### bioassayR

Infrastructure for storing, querying, and analyzing large bioassay datasets within the R environment.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Bioactivity</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Database</span>
<span class="repo-tag">R</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/bioassayR/) [GitHub](https://github.com/girke-lab/bioassayR)
:::
:::

::: {.repo-card}
### ChemmineR

Cheminformatics toolkit for compound similarity analysis, clustering, visualization, and structure-based data mining in R.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Cheminformatics</span>
<span class="repo-tag">R</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Visualization</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/ChemmineR/) [GitHub](https://github.com/girke-lab/ChemmineR)
:::
:::

::: {.repo-card}
### ChemmineOB

Interface connecting ChemmineR workflows to Open Babel functionality for broader structure processing and cheminformatics tasks.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Cheminformatics</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Open Babel</span>
<span class="repo-tag">R</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/ChemmineOB/) [GitHub](https://github.com/girke-lab/ChemmineOB)
:::
:::

::: {.repo-card}
### fmcsR

Tools for fast maximum common substructure analysis to support compound comparison and chemical similarity workflows.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Cheminformatics</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Similarity</span>
<span class="repo-tag">R</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/fmcsR/) [GitHub](https://github.com/girke-lab/fmcsR)
:::
:::

::: {.repo-card}
### eiR

Software for structure-based compound similarity and search workflows using atom environment descriptors.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Cheminformatics</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Similarity Search</span>
<span class="repo-tag">R</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/eiR/) [GitHub](https://github.com/girke-lab/eiR)
:::
:::

:::

## Spatial Omics Visualization {#spatial-omics .repo-section}

::: {.repo-section-intro}
This software area focuses on interactive and publication-oriented visualization methods for spatially resolved omics datasets.
:::

::: {.repo-grid-single}

::: {.repo-card}
### spatialHeatmap

Visualization toolkit for exploring spatially resolved omics data in anatomical and tissue-based contexts.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Spatial Omics</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Visualization</span>
<span class="repo-tag">R</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/spatialHeatmap/) [GitHub](https://github.com/jianhaizhang/spatialHeatmap) [Website](https://spatialheatmap.org)
:::
:::

:::

## Large-Scale Data Analysis Workflows {#workflows .repo-section}

::: {.repo-section-intro}
These repositories provide scalable workflow infrastructure for reproducible analysis of large omics datasets across local, server, and high-performance computing environments.
:::

::: {.repo-grid}

::: {.repo-card}
### systemPipeR

Workflow management environment for designing, running, monitoring, and documenting reproducible omics analysis pipelines.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Workflow</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Omics</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Bioconductor</span>
<span class="repo-tag">R</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/systemPipeR/) [GitHub](https://github.com/tgirke/systemPipeR) [Docs](https://systempipe.org)
:::
:::

::: {.repo-card}
### systemPipeRdata

Companion package providing workflow templates, example datasets, and supporting resources for systemPipeR-based analyses.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Workflow</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Data Package</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Bioconductor</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/systemPipeRdata/) [GitHub](https://github.com/tgirke/systemPipeRdata) [Docs](https://systempipe.org)
:::
:::

::: {.repo-card}
### systemPipeShiny

Web-based interface for interactive execution, management, and monitoring of systemPipeR workflows.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Workflow</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Shiny</span>
<span class="repo-tag">R</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Bioconductor](https://bioconductor.org/packages/systemPipeShiny/) [GitHub](https://github.com/systemPipeR/systemPipeShiny) [Docs](https://systempipe.org)
:::
:::

::: {.repo-card}
### Workflow Templates

Collection of reusable workflow templates for common omics applications, designed to support reproducible and scalable data analysis with systemPipeR.

::: {.repo-tags}
<span class="repo-tag">Templates</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Omics</span>
<span class="repo-tag">Reproducibility</span>
:::

::: {.repo-links}
[Overview](https://systempipe.org/about/project/#core-packages) [GitHub](https://systempipe.org/about/project/#workflow-templates)
:::
:::

:::
